sourcesContent:
import './Home.css'; import cartoonGirl from '../../assets/cartoon-girl.svg'; function Home() { const handleContactSubmit = (event) => { event.preventDefault(); window.alert('Thanks for reaching out! Our team will connect within 24h. Keep swapping skills!'); event.currentTarget.reset(); }; const handleStartSwap = () => { window.alert('Skill Swap Hub demo: Sign-up / login coming soon. Start your skill journey!'); }; const handleExploreSkills = () => { const aboutSection = document.getElementById('about'); if (aboutSection) { aboutSection.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' }); } }; return (
SkillSwap
Home About Team Reviews Contact Login / Signup

Exchange skills,
not money.

Join a global community where your expertise becomes your currency. Learn, teach, and grow together - 100% free, 100% collaborative.

1.2k+

Active swappers

340+

Skills shared

98%

Satisfaction

Trending skills this week

UI/UX Design Python Guitar Data Analysis Creative Writing Spanish

Swap any skill - from coding to cooking. No money, just mutual growth.

TrustScore 4.9/5

How Skill Swap Hub works

A new way to learn without limits - built on trust, transparency, and true collaboration.

Discover

1. List and Discover

Showcase what you can teach and what you would like to learn. Our smart matching suggests ideal partners.

Exchange

2. Agree and Exchange

Send swap requests, agree on sessions, and learn together. Zero money, pure skill value.

Trust

3. Rate and Build Trust

After each swap, leave a review. Reputation scores build credibility and safer collaboration.

True collaborative consumption without financial barriers

Skills are meant to be shared and scaled through community trust.

Meet the creators

Passionate about building a fair skill economy

Haseena Begum

Frontend Architect

React expert and design system lover, building fluid experiences for swappers.

What swappers say

Real feedback from our community of skill enthusiasts

★★★★★

Skill Swap Hub changed my learning journey. I taught Python and learned photography in return. No cash needed, just mutual respect.

- Priya Sharma
★★★★★

The reputation system makes it safe. After two swaps I felt fully confident. Great platform for real collaboration.

- Arjun Mehta
★★★★☆

I can share my graphic design skills and learn digital marketing. Super intuitive and the community is awesome.

- Neha Kapoor
Verified reviews powered by transparent community feedback

Get in touch

Questions or ideas? Let us shape the future of skill exchange together.
